results.name: ruby_hash_group
results.code:
# Group words by their first letter (case‑insensitive) and print them
# Format: letter: word1,word2,...
# Words keep their original order; output lines sorted by letter.

filename = ARGV[0]
File.open(filename, 'r') or exit 1

words = File.read(filename).split('\n')
groups = Hash.new { |k, _| [] }

words.each do |raw|
  word = raw.strip
  next if word.empty?
  first_char = raw[0]
  key = first_char.lowercase
  groups[key] << word
end

Hash.keys.sort { |k| k }.each do |key|
  puts #{key}: #{groups[key].join(',')}
end

results.name: ruby_class_stack
results.code:
class Stack
  @stack = []
  def push(item)
    @stack.push(item)
  end
  def pop
    return nil if @stack.empty?
    @stack.pop
  end
  def peek
    @stack[-1] unless @stack.empty?
  end
end

stack = Stack.new
stack.push(1)
stack.push(2)
stack.push(3)

puts stack.peek
puts stack.pop
puts stack.peek
